name: Nerona USD
collateral: Backed 1:1 by M (M0 Protocol's tokenized short-term U.S. Treasury bills, routed through USTB / Superstate Short Duration U.S. Government Securities Fund); per the M0 dashboard the wrapper holds ~$50.25M of USTB-collateralised M against ~$50M USDnr in circulation, with the surplus held in a Stability Reserve buffer. Reserves sit in M0 SPVs managed by the M0 Minter (MXON)
pegMechanism: Permissioned 1:1 wrapper around M0's $M token: USDnr is minted by Nerona by depositing/wrapping $M (sourced from MXON, the legal Minter on the M0 network) and burned 1:1 against $M on redemption. T-bill yield earned by the underlying M accrues to the M0 reserve / Nerona — USDnr holders receive no rebase or NAV growth themselves. Mint/redeem is gated to permissioned, KYC-onboarded clients of Nerona's private wealth platform

reserves.name: Short-term U.S. Treasury Bills (via USTB / M0 Protocol)
